text: Hey, I was just wondering if there's any kind of discount for students? Like, do you have any info on that?
im getting an error when trying to upload my file, it says something about formats but i thought it was supported
The app fails to load on my iPhone 13 after the last update. Please advise.

I am experiencing an unusual technical issue where my software crashes whenever I try to open it, but I also noticed that the mouse cursor occasionally freezes. It's quite perplexing because my internet connection appears to be stable, and I have cleared the cache as suggested in previous support documents. Could you provide some insight into what might be causing this situation?
My app keeps crashing when I try to upload a file. What could be wrong?

So, my app just won’t open. Tried a few times, didn’t work. Oh, and I think there was an update? But, you know, not sure if it’s related. What’s going on? Also, I have a million photos in there — hope it’s safe!

I thought I had successfully cancelled my subscription last month, but just noticed that I've still been charged this time around. This is really frustrating because I clearly followed the steps you provided, and now I'm left wondering why this happened. Can you please look into this and process a refund? It would be great to get this sorted as soon as possible. Thank you.
I can't access my files, and also my cat just knocked over my coffee. What's going on?

I recently attempted to update my email address linked to my account, but I received a notification that my current email is invalid. However, I have been receiving emails without issue. Can you clarify why this is happening and assist me in resolving this inconsistency?

I recently purchased a pair of shoes that I was really excited about, but after only a few days of wearing them, they started to fall apart. I thought they were supposed to be durable! I’m feeling quite frustrated because I expected better quality. Can I please get a refund? Also, I was told there was a promotion for a 10% discount on my next purchase if I signed up for the newsletter, but I don’t want to deal with that right now. My main concern is getting my money back for these shoes. Thank you for your help!
My app keeps crashing every time I try to open it. I’ve tried reinstalling but nothing helps.
I ordered something last week and it still hasn’t shown up. Wasn’t it supposed to get here by now? Really frustrating!

I am writing to request a refund for an order that was placed over a month ago, and despite several attempts to contact support, there has been no resolution. The order number is 12345AB. Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

I've been experiencing a persistent issue with the app on my tablet. Every time I attempt to upload a photo, the application freezes, and my device often seems to lag significantly afterwards. It's quite frustrating because I've ensured that my software is up-to-date, and I've even cleared the cache. Additionally, I find the notifications are sometimes delayed, which makes it hard for me to keep track of new messages. Could you please assist in resolving these problems? Thank you!

I’ve been trying to log into my account for what feels like forever, and it keeps saying that my password is incorrect. However, I swear I just changed it yesterday, and I’m not sure if it’s a glitch or if I somehow ended up locked out? This feels really frustrating, especially since I’m worried I might miss some important updates while I’m stuck here trying to remember the right password. Can someone please clarify what's happening?
I updated my password yesterday, but I keep getting logged out for some reason. I thought I did everything right, but now I can't log back in.
